overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in dark wizard robes walking along a narrow coastal dirt path at night. The scene transitions from a rocky cliffside to an open shoreline with visible water, rendered in a realistic fantasy game engine with atmospheric blue moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow coastal trail between cliff wall and scrubland

agents.ego_description: character in dark robes walking steadily along the dirt path away from the camera

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming a wall along the right side of the path
uneven dirt and gravel path winding along the coastline
small glowing orange embers or campfire visible at the base of the cliff
large rocky outcropping visible in the distance ahead
low bushes and coastal grasses on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff wall on the right. A warm glow from campfire embers contrasts with the cool blue moonlight. Sparse scrub vegetation lines the left side while a large rock formation looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal overlook with water views

events.description: trail opens up to reveal coastal waters and distant shoreline on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens to reveal the water

entered.detail: calm dark ocean or lake water visible beyond the trail edge
tall coastal grasses and bushes on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the path widens, the coastal waters become visible on the left under the night sky. The cliff wall recedes into the distance while tall grasses appear on the right. The character continues walking toward the large rock formation now closer ahead, with the campfire glow left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow coastal trail that transitions from a confined cliffside path into an open shoreline under a moonlit sky. It begins with the character walking beside a rocky cliff wall, where the warm glow of campfire embers contrasts with the cool blue moonlight and sparse scrub vegetation. As the path widens, the cliff wall recedes into the distance and the scene opens up to reveal the dark coastal waters on the left. The camera continues forward as the campfire light fades, shifting the surroundings to tall grasses on the right while the character approaches a looming rock formation.
